title: GPT 5.6 Sol Just Blew Up The AI World
summary: OpenAI launched GPT 5.6 Sol with restricted access to trusted partners following U.S. government pressure. The model includes new coding and cyber capabilities and introduces Jalapeño, OpenAI's first custom inference chip developed with Broadcom.
writeup: The video covers OpenAI's launch of GPT 5.6 Sol, a model released with access restricted to trusted partners after U.S. government pressure. It outlines two main developments: new coding and cyber capabilities in the model, and Jalapeño, OpenAI's first custom inference chip built with Broadcom. The restricted rollout and the move into custom inference silicon mark shifts in how the model is distributed and run.
